subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-03-16
subcodes.first_line: The test of existence is motion. An object which has in itself the power of motion lives. If motion is withheld growth ceases.
subcodes.subjects: @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @education and the development of capacity, @spiritual transformation, @heat and motion
